items.desc_en: Space Force and Customs and Border Patrol are using a rodeo as a way to drive up recruitment numbers.
items.desc_zh: 太空军和海关与边境巡逻队正在利用牛仔竞技来增加招募人数。

items.title_en: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.title_zh: 世界杯使得预测市场量飙升至历史新高
items.desc_en: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.desc_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量在 6 月份均创下历史新高。新的预测市场平台 Rothera 也能够管理 20 亿美元的交易量。

items.desc_en: Stop Feeling Like a Fraud. Start Owning Your Success.
items.desc_zh: Stop Feeling Like a Fraud. Start Owning Your Success.

items.title_en: Parents warned not to publicly share children’s images amid AI abuse risks
items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.title_zh: Pennen
items.desc_en: One quiet handwritten page a day. No feed, no AI.
items.desc_zh: 每天安静地手写一页。没有饲料，就没有人工智能。

items.desc_en: AI that fights customer service for you

items.desc_en: Record Once, Send Confidently
items.desc_zh: 录制一次，放心发送

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: DocsAlot
items.title_zh: DocsAlot
items.desc_en: Documentation that works for both humans and AI systems
items.desc_zh: 适用于人类和人工智能系统的文档

items.title_en: Wonka Netflix show faces backlash for AI-generated Gene Wilder voice
items.title_zh: Netflix 节目《旺卡》因人工智能生成吉恩·怀尔德声音而遭到强烈反对
items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？
items.desc_en: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.
items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。

items.desc_zh: Real-time structured search trusted by agents and developers

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We hear concerns that shadow banning is limiting access to health advice for women.
items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。

items.title_en: WhatsApp to let people chat without swapping phone numbers
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 让人们无需交换电话号码即可聊天
items.desc_en: The app's new usernames feature will be rolled out globally over the next few months.
items.desc_zh: 该应用程序的新用户名功能将在未来几个月内在全球推出。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.desc_en: Social listening for the agent era
items.desc_zh: 代理时代的社交聆听

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers
items.title_zh: 为什么《GTA 6》将在没有光盘的情况下启动 - 这对游戏玩家意味着什么
items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？
